mapper.select: SELECT out_id AS outId, out_time AS outTime, create_by AS createBy, abnormal_status AS abnormalStatus, abnormal_note AS abnormalNote FROM warehouse_out WHERE out_id = #{outId}
mapper.insert:
insert into warehouse_out
out_time, create_by, abnormal_status, abnormal_note,
#{outTime}, #{createBy}, #{abnormalStatus}, #{abnormalNote},
